description: Single-slide baseline deck with explicit text runs and stable formatting.
risk: Baseline load, cleanup, export, and fidelity path.

description: Single body shape with explicit font family and font size drift.
risk: Mixed explicit font family and font size runs in one body shape.

description: One paragraph containing mixed font runs inside the same paragraph node.
risk: Mixed font runs inside the same paragraph.

description: Bullet-heavy deck with multiple levels and mixed run formatting.
risk: Multiple bullet levels with explicit indentation and mixed run formatting.

description: Two-slide deck with nested bullet lists and repeated indentation patterns.
risk: Nested bullet indentation and repeated list structures.

description: Placeholder-style title and body shapes across multiple slides.
Dense placeholder-style template with repeated title/body placeholders.
risk: Placeholder-heavy templates with repeated content shapes.

description: Slides containing field nodes alongside text runs.
risk: Field nodes alongside text runs that must preserve token order and content.

description: Deck with theme and slide-master entries but partially inherited text formatting.
risk: Theme inheritance and sparse explicit run formatting.

description: Single-slide deck with one eligible body group whose explicit alignment differs from the dominant body style.
risk: Alignment reduction through dominant-body-style cleanup on admitted corpus input.

description: Grouped shapes containing text runs with mixed explicit formatting.
risk: Grouped shapes and nested text bodies.

description: Deck with explicit slide master, slide layout, and theme relationships.
risk: Slide master and slide layout variation entries.

description: Multi-slide robustness deck for optional extended runs.
risk: Larger multi-slide deck for optional robustness coverage outside normal CI.
